Exposure: newsletter, social media, word of mouth
Activity: The customer has shown interest in our online course and has reached out for more information.
Terminate_condition: When the customer explicitly expresses a refusal to purchase the course, or indicates they no longer need further information, the conversation will end.
Agreee_condition: When the customer shows interest in the course and is willing to learn more or purchase it, the conversation will end. The conversation will then be handed over to a human customer service representative.
Ending: Thank you for your time. We look forward to serving you better!
